$comment: Meta-schema for a component-family parameter dictionary. A dictionary defines the canonical parameter keys, units, groups, and vendor aliases for one family (ldo, buck_converter, mosfet, ...). The datasheet schema stays family-agnostic; the dictionary supplies the vocabulary.
title: Family Parameter Dictionary

array.description: True when typically specified across multiple conditions (per load current, per frequency).

conditionAxis.description: The condition axis that distinguishes array entries, e.g. "I_OUT" for dropout, "F" for PSRR.

iecCdd.description: IEC 61360 Common Data Dictionary concept, where a clean mapping exists.

optional.description: True for feature-gated params (power-good, sink current) present only on some parts.
